sections.title: Use of Wanted — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Wanted — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Use of Wanted is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + wanted + to + verb / noun (past tense — all subjects use "wanted"). Rules: 'Wanted' is the past tense of 'want' — same form for all subjects (I, he, she, we, they) | Used for desires or wishes in the past | Negative: did not want | Question: Did + subject + want...?
sections.formula: Subject + wanted + to + verb / noun (past tense — all subjects use "wanted")

examples.hindi: वह एक नई कार चाहता था।

examples.english: She wanted to become a doctor.

examples.hindi: वे उस काम को खत्म करना चाहते थे।
examples.english: They wanted to finish that work.

sections.title: Use of Wanted — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Wanted — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Use of Wanted that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.
sections.formula: Subject + wanted + to + verb / noun (past tense — all subjects use "wanted")

examples.hindi: मुझे वह किताब नहीं चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I did not want that book.

examples.hindi: वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता था।
examples.english: He wanted to talk to me.
She wanted to become an engineer.

sections.title: Use of Wanted — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Wanted — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Use of Wanted in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.
sections.formula: Subject + wanted + to + verb / noun (past tense — all subjects use "wanted")

examples.hindi: मैं इस काम को जल्दी खत्म करना चाहता था।
examples.english: I wanted to finish this work quickly.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम बाहर जाना चाहते थे?
examples.english: Did you want to go outside?

sections.title: Use of Wanted — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Wanted — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Use of Wanted. Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.
sections.formula: Subject + wanted + to + verb / noun (past tense — all subjects use "wanted")

examples.english: I wanted to know the truth.

examples.hindi: वह अपना व्यवसाय शुरू करना चाहती थी।
examples.english: She wanted to start her own business.

examples.hindi: मुझे कोई गलती नहीं चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I did not want any mistake.
